image:image.image:title: Roshan R Sivakumar, Chief Operating Officer, RR Hevirex Coach Builders, Karur Tamil Nadu
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar, COO at RR Hevirex Coach Builders. MBA Decision Analytics from Virginia Commonwealth University. MBA Lean Operations from Christ University, Bengaluru. BE Mechanical Engineering from M.Kumarasamy College of Engineering, Karur.

image:image.image:title: Christ University Central Campus Building, Bengaluru, Karnataka
image:image.image:caption: Christ University central campus building in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India, where Roshan R Sivakumar completed his MBA in Lean Operations and Systems

image:image.image:title: Chrizellenz 2024, 3rd Prize Business Analytics Competition, Christ University
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar receiving 3rd prize at Chrizellenz 2024 Business Analytics Competition at Christ University, Bengaluru

image:image.image:title: Ushus Organising Team, Christ University, Bengaluru
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar with the organising team at Ushus, Christ University flagship cultural event

image:image.image:title: L3 Lean Operations Classmates, Christ University MBA
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar with L3 classmates from the Lean Operations and Systems MBA program at Christ University, Bengaluru

image:image.image:title: Roshan R Sivakumar at VCU Graduation Ceremony, Virginia Commonwealth University
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar at his graduation ceremony at Virginia Commonwealth University, Richmond, Virginia, USA, completing his MBA in Decision Analytics

image:image.image:title: Roshan R Sivakumar, AMA Best Spokesperson Award, VCU
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar receiving the Best Spokesperson award at the American Marketing Association Fall Induction Ceremony, Virginia Commonwealth University

image:image.image:title: Roshan R Sivakumar with Professor James Eggleston, VCU
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar with Professor James Eggleston at Virginia Commonwealth University, who shaped his approach to operations management and Six Sigma

image:image.image:title: Roshan R Sivakumar First Snowfall, Richmond Virginia
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar experiencing his first snowfall in Richmond, Virginia during his MBA studies at VCU

image:image.image:title: Roshan R Sivakumar First Day at VCU, Virginia Commonwealth University
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar on his first day at Virginia Commonwealth University, Richmond, Virginia

image:image.image:title: Roshan R Sivakumar Diwali Celebration at VCU
image:image.image:caption: Roshan R Sivakumar celebrating Diwali with the Indian student community at Virginia Commonwealth University, Richmond
